title: RPG Series Class Selection
description: Uses Origins to let you select a class from the RPG series
body:
Uses Origins to let you select a class from the RPG series.

When you select a class you are given a book with curse of binding in your spell book slot with all spells attached.
I may make a language file that renamed curse of binding to something like "Cannot be removed" to make the idea of your skill book being cursed less jarring.

Here is how it looks:

![Class selection screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f88855e9ab2a437ed8ebb2899b99a6202a9e3038.png)
